name: Qatar Islamic Insurance Group  Q.P.S.C.
summary: Qatar Islamic Insurance Group Q.P.S.C. provides a range of insurance products and services in Qatar. The company primarily offers property, travel, motor, marine, fire, engineering, liability, life, medical, money-bankers, energy, electronics and computer, takaful, health, and family package insurance products; and general insurance products, including burglary, plate glass, office multicover, and accident insurance products. It serves private and public sectors, including government offices, banking institutions, hotels, and other organizations, as well as infrastructure projects. The company was formerly known as Qatar Islamic Insurance Company Q.P.S.C. Qatar Islamic Insurance Group Q.P.S.C. was incorporated in 1993 and is based in Doha, Qatar.
